pattern: A small finite-state DP over (absences so far, trailing late streak) counts eligible records of each length modulo the large prime.
hints: Track only how many absences have occurred (0 or 1) and how many lates end the record so far (0, 1, or 2).
Appending P resets the late streak, appending L extends it up to two, and appending A is allowed once.
Maintain counts over the six states, advance one day at a time applying the transitions modulo 1e9+7, and sum all final states.

stress.description: fixed moderate n to exercise the modular DP
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    return [max(1, min(100000, size))]
